spec.description: Total number of processed slots in state transition function

spec.expr: sum by (network, job, instance, client) (lean_connected_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", client!=""})
sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_gossip_mesh_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
sum by (network, job, instance, client) (lean_gossip_mesh_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", client!=""})

spec.description: Time taken to process state transition function

sum by (network, job, instance) (lean_connected_peers{network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

spec.title: Time taken to build aggregated payloads
Time taken to build a block

spec.expr:
max by (network, job, instance) (
  (lean_node_sync_status{status="synced", network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 1) * 2
  or
  (lean_node_sync_status{status="syncing", network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 1) * 1
  or
  (lean_node_sync_status{status="idle", network=~"$network", job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 1) * 0
)

spec.title: Aggregated signature building time (network-wide)
spec.description: Pooled histogram across all scraped instances for the selected network. Use this for a single p50/p95/p99 of lean_pq_sig_aggregated_signatures_building_time_seconds.
